# Angle of elevation adjustment

## Short Teaching Summary
When calculating angles of elevation from an observer's eyes, the effective height used in the calculation is the total height minus the observer's height.

## Difficulty
0.30

## Prerequisites
- Line of Sight
- Trigonometry for height and distance
- Angle of Elevation
- Eye level measurement reference

## Related Concepts
- Line of Sight (requires)
- Trigonometry for height and distance (requires)
- Angle of Elevation (requires)
- Eye level measurement reference (requires)
